title: Medical staff representation on commission
doc_html:
§1076.  Medical staff representation on commission

Notwithstanding the provisions of R.S. 42:61 et seq. or any other law to the contrary, members of the medical staffs of hospital service district facilities may serve on the hospital service district commission.  

Acts 1984, No. 322, §1.
